On this page

  • Overview
  • Request Body
  • Responses
    • 200
    • 400
    • 404
    • 500

Get a block

POST
/evnode.v1.StoreService/GetBlock

Retrieve a block by height or hash from the chain store.

Request Body required

Section titled “Request Body required ”

Block request parameters

Request to get a block by height or hash

object
height

Block height to retrieve

integer format: int64
Example
hash

Block hash to retrieve (base64-encoded)

string format: byte
Example
Examples

Get block by height

Get block by hash

Responses

Section titled “ Responses ”

200

Section titled “200 ”

Block retrieved successfully

Response containing block data

object
block

Chain block data

object
header

Signed block header

object
header

Block header information

object
version

Version captures the consensus rules for processing a block

object
block
required

Block version

integer format: int64
app
required

App version

integer format: int64
height
required

Block height

integer format: int64
time
required

Block creation time

integer format: int64
last_header_hash

Previous block info (base64-encoded)

string format: byte
data_hash

Block.Data root aka Transactions (base64-encoded)

string format: byte
app_hash

State after applying txs from the current block (base64-encoded)

string format: byte
proposer_address

Original proposer of the block (base64-encoded)

string format: byte
validator_hash

Validatorhash for compatibility with tendermint light client (base64-encoded)

string format: byte
chain_id
required

Chain ID the block belongs to

string
signature

Header signature (base64-encoded)

string format: byte
signer

Signer of a block

object
address
required

Address of the signer (base64-encoded)

string format: byte
pub_key
required

Public key of the signer (base64-encoded)

string format: byte
data

Block transaction data

object
metadata

Metadata of a block

object
chain_id
required

Chain ID

string
height
required

Block height

integer format: int64
time
required

Block creation time

integer format: int64
last_data_hash

Previous block info (base64-encoded)

string format: byte
txs
required

List of transactions (base64-encoded)

Array<string>
header_da_height

Data availability height for header

integer format: int64
data_da_height

Data availability height for data

integer format: int64

400

Section titled “400 ”

Bad Request

Error response

object
code
required

Error code

integer
message
required

Error message

string
details

Additional error details

Array<object>
object

404

Section titled “404 ”

Not Found

Error response

object
code
required

Error code

integer
message
required

Error message

string
details

Additional error details

Array<object>
object

500

Section titled “500 ”

Internal Server Error

Error response

object
code
required

Error code

integer
message
required

Error message

string
details

Additional error details

Array<object>
object
